title: Fix issue #1: Multiple tokio runtimes
description: Remove #[tokio::main] from ddg::query, move to main(), use join_all

title: Fix issue #2: Panics on invalid user input
description: Replace panics/unwraps with graceful error handling

title: Fix issue #3: URL-encode search query in ddg.rs
description: Encode query string before inserting into DDG request URL to prevent malformed requests

title: Fix issue #4: use geodesic destination for accurate lat/lng offsets in grid.rs
Fix issue #5: deduplicate results by Place.id in ddg.rs
Fix issue #6: validate --file-type at clap level to prevent silent no-output
Fix issue #7: add HTTP request timeout to reqwest Client in ddg.rs
description: Configure timeout(Duration::from_secs(15)) on Client::builder() to prevent indefinite hangs on slow/unresponsive DDG API

title: Fix issue #9: scale grid cell size dynamically based on search distance in ddg.rs
description: Replace hardcoded 5.0 cell size with (distance_miles / 2.0).clamp(1.0, 20.0) to avoid hundreds of HTTP requests for large distances

title: Fix issue #10: stream JSON output with serde_json::to_writer instead of building string in memory
Fix issue #11: migrate clap v2 to v4 with derive API
description: Upgrade clap from 2.33.3 to v4, rewrite main.rs CLI definition using #[derive(Parser)] struct

title: Fix issue #12: pin geocoding wildcard version to 0.4
Fix issue #13: remove unused 'use std::str' import from ddg.rs
